info.name: TMS — Transaction Management System API
info.description:
Bo test API day du cho He thong Quan ly Giao dich Ngan hang.

## Huong dan su dung
1. Chay **Login - Admin (saves token)** de lay va luu token tu dong
2. Doi voi endpoint can role khac, chay login tuong ung roi copy access_token
3. Thu tu chay goi y: Health -> Auth -> Lookup -> Transactions -> Cases -> Loans -> Dashboard -> Reports -> Analyst

## Tai khoan mac dinh (sau khi chay seed.py)
| Username  | Password     | Role     |
|-----------|--------------|----------|
| admin     | Admin@123    | ADMIN    |
| operator1 | Operator@123 | OPERATOR |
| reviewer1 | Reviewer@123 | REVIEWER |
| manager1  | Manager@123  | MANAGER  |
| analyst1  | Analyst@123  | ANALYST  |

## Du lieu mau (seed.py)
- Customers: CUST001 / CUST002 / CUST003
- Merchants: Vinmart / Shopee Online / CGV Cinema / Unknown Online Store
- Channels: 1=POS, 2=ATM, 3=Online Banking, 4=Mobile App

variable.description: User ID for management tests (auto-saved by Create User)
Case ID (auto-saved by List Cases or Submit Transaction)
Audit Log ID (auto-saved by List Audit Logs)
Sample customer (Nguyen Van An) from seed data

exec: // To switch role: copy the access_token from response body and update collection variable
// To switch role: copy the access_token from response body and update collection variable
// To switch role: copy the access_token from response body and update collection variable
// To switch role: copy the access_token from response body and update collection variable

request.description: CAUTION: After testing, revert password back to Admin@123 to avoid breaking other tests.

item.name: 🔍 Lookup
item.description: Yeu cau OPERATOR (channels: tat ca roles)

item.name: 💳 Transactions
item.description: Submit: OPERATOR. List/Get: OPERATOR + ANALYST + MANAGER.

request.description: Low-risk transaction at Vinmart (POS). Expected: APPROVED.

item.name: Submit Transaction — High Amount (Shopee, may MANUAL_REVIEW)

request.description: High-amount online transaction. May route to MANUAL_REVIEW and create a Case.

item.name: Submit Transaction — High Risk Merchant (Unknown, may REJECT)

request.description: Transaction at HIGH-risk merchant Unknown Online Store. Likely REJECTED.
Mobile App transaction at CGV Cinema.

item.name: Submit Transaction — Duplicate Idempotency Key (409 expected)

request.description: Replay with same idempotency_key — must be blocked.

item.name: 📋 Cases (Manual Review)
item.description: Yeu cau REVIEWER (hoac MANAGER). Case duoc tao tu dong khi Transaction co status MANUAL_REVIEW.

exec: } else { console.log("No cases found. Submit a high-risk transaction first."); }

request.description: Returns case details with transaction info, rule_hits, card_velocity. Saves version.
REVIEWER self-assigns OPEN case. Will fail if already assigned to another reviewer.
REVIEWER approves case. 'version' must match current version (optimistic locking).
REVIEWER rejects case. Update 'version' to match current.

item.name: 💰 Loans
item.description: Apply: OPERATOR. Simulate/List/Get: OPERATOR+REVIEWER. Decision: REVIEWER.

request.description: AI PD Score simulation — does NOT create a real loan. Returns pd_score + risk_level.

exec: console.log("PD Score:", j.pd_score, "| Risk:", j.risk_level, "| Factors:", j.top_risk_factors.join(", "));
console.log("Status:", j.status, "| PD Score:", j.pd_score, "| Risk:", j.risk_level, "| Version:", j.version);

request.description: REVIEWER approves loan. System auto-calculates monthly_payment and maturity_date.

item.name: 📜 Audit Logs
item.description: Yeu cau MANAGER hoac ADMIN. Audit log la immutable.

item.name: List Audit Logs (all, saves first log_id)

exec: console.log("Total txn:", j.total_transactions, "| Fraud rate:", j.fraud_rate);

item.name: 📁 Reports (Export)
item.description: Yeu cau MANAGER hoac ADMIN. Toi da 5000 rows moi lan export.

request.description: Update fraud model thresholds. Changes are applied immediately.

exec: console.log("Fraud dist: approved:", d.approved_count, "review:", d.review_count, "rejected:", d.rejected_count);
console.log("Loan dist: low:", d.low_risk_count, "med:", d.medium_risk_count, "high:", d.high_risk_count);

item.name: 🎮 Demo Runner
item.description: Start/Stop: OPERATOR. Status: tat ca roles.

item.name: Start Demo — Normal Rate (1 rps, 50 req)

request.description: Spawns background task: 1 req/s, 50 total requests, 20% loans.

item.name: Start Demo — High Rate (5 rps, 100 req)

request.description: Runs until manually stopped. Use Stop Demo to terminate.

exec: console.log("Running:", j.running, "| Sent:", j.sent, "| Stats:", JSON.stringify(j.stats));
console.log("Demo stopped. Total sent:", j.sent, "| Stats:", JSON.stringify(j.stats));
